desc: Furnace is 18 years old and short-cycling. Get 3 quotes for a full HVAC replacement before winter.

desc: Kitchen faucet drips at the base. Need a new cartridge or a full faucet swap.
name: Fix leaky kitchen faucet

name: Plant okra & herbs (spring)

desc: Annual furnace service and filter change before heating season.
name: Service furnace before winter

desc: Cold air leaking in through the basement windows. Re-caulk all four before fall.
name: Caulk basement windows

desc: Gutters clogged with maple seeds and leaves. Clear front and back, check downspouts.
name: Clean gutters

desc: Page Turners meets next month. Pick the next read and send the poll to the group.
name: Pick Page Turners next read

desc: Choir rehearses Thursdays. Print the alto sheet music for the summer service set.
name: Print alto sheet music for choir

desc: Garbage disposal jammed and humming. Reset it, and call a plumber if it won't clear.
name: Fix jammed garbage disposal

desc: Refinish the back deck once the weather is dry - sand, then two coats of stain.
name: Stain the back deck

desc: Try the new thieboudienne recipe for Sunday dinner; pick up jasmine rice and fish.
name: Plan Sunday thieboudienne dinner
